content: Chart library recommendation for PWA Timeline view: Recharts is the best default for React PWAs. Bundle size is larger than Chart.js (Recharts ~136 kB gzipped vs Chart.js core ~92 kB gzipped) but Recharts is SVG-based and React-native (no canvas setup, works well with Tailwind). 48.9M weekly npm downloads. Chart.js can be tree-shaken to ~25-35 kB for a single chart type, but requires react-chartjs-2 wrapper and imperative canvas API that fights React's declarative model. Victory is similar size to Recharts but less popular. For a simple monthly bar chart + a line chart in Timeline view, Recharts component API is clean: <BarChart><Bar><XAxis><YAxis><Tooltip>. Tree-shaking partially works via named imports. If bundle size is critical, use Chart.js with tree-shaking (register only BarController, LineController). The trade-off: Recharts DX advantage over Chart.js's imperative canvas approach is significant for a React project.
